title: T-113 â€” Email Delivery Log screen (SET-093 Â§13.4)
prompt:
# T-113 â€” Email Delivery Log screen (SET-093 Â§13.4)

PRD: docs/prd/02-SETTINGS-PRD.md Â§13.4 (EmailConfig + Notifications UI surfaces)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Build SET-093 Email Delivery Log â€” last N (default 100) sent + failed + retry status entries from the email outbox/log table (per Â§13.2 outbox pattern). Filters by trigger_code, recipient, status, date range. Read-only viewer with per-row 'View payload' modal.

## Implementation contract
1. Page at apps/web/app/[locale]/(admin)/settings/notifications/email-log/page.tsx (Server Component) reads last 100 email_delivery_log rows for caller's org_id ordered by created_at DESC.
2. List columns: created_at, trigger_code, recipient_to (truncated), subject, status (queued|sent|failed|dlq), retry_count, last_error_summary.
3. Toolbar: status filter, trigger_code filter, date range filter, search by recipient.
4. Per-row 'View payload' link opens read-only modal showing rendered subject + body + raw mustache vars JSON.
5. RBAC: requires `settings.email.read` (re-uses Â§13 admin permission set from T-002).

## Files
- apps/web/app/[locale]/(admin)/settings/notifications/email-log/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/[locale]/(admin)/settings/notifications/email-log/page.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` array.

## Test strategy
1. RED: RTL test seeds 5 email_delivery_log rows mixed status; asserts filters narrow rows, payload modal renders, RBAC 403 when missing perm.
   `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/[locale]/(admin)/settings/notifications/email-log/page.test.tsx`
2. RED must fail.
3. GREEN: implement Server Component + filters + modal.
4. Re-run RED + `pnpm typecheck` + `pnpm lint`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow re-send / retry from UI (DLQ worker owns retries per Â§13.2).
- Do not log full PII payload to client; mask recipient emails to first-3 + domain in list (full visible only in modal).
- Do not import @radix-ui/* outside packages/ui (Â§0).

Stack: TS + Next.js App Router + Drizzle + pnpm + vitest + Playwright + Server Actions. PRD: docs/prd/02-SETTINGS-PRD.md v3.5.

## Prototype reference
**Source:** `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/admin-screens.jsx:152-210`
**Label:** `rules_registry_screen`
**Component type:** table

> **No exact prototype** â€” closest visual pattern: `rules_registry_screen` at `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/admin-screens.jsx:152-210`. Build in the same structural style as this screen. Re-use the same filter toolbar + Section/table pattern for an audit-style log list; status badge tokens follow the queued/sent/failed/dlq mapping in the same density as the coverage badges.

### Parity requirements (mandatory ACs)
The production implementation MUST match the prototype on three dimensions â€” add these as explicit ACs:
1. **Structural parity** â€” same sections, same field labels, same shadcn primitives invoked, same modals triggered from same actions.
2. **Visual parity** â€” same density tokens, same shadcn/Radix primitives (no drift to plain HTML), same layout proportions.
3. **Interaction parity** â€” same enable/disable rules, same loading/empty/error states, same keyboard focus order.

### Translation notes (from prototype-labels index)
- window.SETTINGS_RULES mock array â†’ Drizzle query on rules_registry table with type and coverage filters
- Type and coverage selects â†’ URL search params; Server Component re-renders filtered list
- Coverage badge logic (missing 30d) â†’ computed field: last_dry_run_at < now() - interval '30 days'
- Export JSON button â†’ Server Action streaming JSON from rules_registry table
- onOpenRule(r.code) â†’ Next.js router.push('/settings/rules/[code]') for rule detail screen
- Row highlight for missing coverage (background:#fffbeb) â†’ TanStack Table row className callback
- Hardcoded labels â†’ next-intl keys

### shadcn primitives to use
`Table`, `Select`, `Badge`, `Button`

pipeline_inputs.description: Email Delivery Log (SET-093): last N email outbox runs viewer + filters + payload modal + recipient masking.
pipeline_inputs.details:
PRD Â§13.4 SET-093: `Last N sent + failed + retry status`. Underlying email_delivery_log table is populated by the email outbox worker per Â§13.2; this UI is purely read-only. Recipient masking guards admin viewers from inadvertently exposing PII at-a-glance â€” full address visible only in payload modal.

Additional acceptance detail preserved from compressed AC list:
- Given the caller lacks `settings.email.read`, when the page is requested, then a 403 page renders.
- UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
out_of_scope: Re-send / retry from UI (DLQ worker owns retries)
Provider-side bounce/spam analytics (defer to provider dashboard)
acceptance_criteria: Given 5 email_delivery_log rows exist (mix of sent / failed / dlq), when the page renders, then 5 rows are listed in created_at DESC order with status badges.

Given a recipient email is 'jan.kowalski@example.com', when the row renders in the list column, then it is shown as 'jan@example.com' (first-3 + domain mask) and the full address is visible only after opening the payload modal.
Given the user filters status='failed' with trigger_code='fa_d365_ready', when the list re-renders, then only failed rows for that trigger are visible.

Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect the task evidence, then these additional requirements are proven together: Given the caller lacks `settings.email.read`, when the page is requested, then a 403 page renders.; UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
test_strategy: RED: RTL test seeds rows + asserts mask, filters, payload modal, RBAC 403.
GREEN: implement Server Component + mask helper + filters + modal.
For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
risk_red_lines: Do not allow re-send / retry from UI (DLQ worker owns retries per Â§13.2).
Do not log full PII payload to client; mask recipient emails in list view.
